julesThoughtProcess: Cyan (#00FFFF) represents high-tech energy and fits the cyberpunk theme perfectly. I chose the coordinates x: 1000, y: 1000 to position this block right in the center of our Quadtree mosaic, serving as an eye-catching focal point.
storyPanel: Subject #1776401874797: A rogue data runner known as 'The Glitch'. Captured mid-sprint through the neon-drenched alleys of Sector 4. Their cyan signature always preceeds a system crash.
